mapper.sql:
select ${resource.idColumn} as id, #{resource.pathValue} as resource, ${resource.codeColumn} as item_code, ${resource.nameColumn} as item_name,
parent_id, null as parent_id,
category_id, null as category_id,
series_id, null as series_id,
spec, null as spec,
unit, null as unit,
status, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from ${resource.tableName}
mapper.insert: insert into ${resource.tableName}( ${resource.codeColumn}, ${resource.nameColumn}, parent_id, category_id, series_id, spec, unit, status, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{record.itemCode}, #{record.itemName}, #{record.parentId}, #{record.categoryId}, #{record.seriesId}, #{record.spec}, #{record.unit}, #{record.status}, #{record.sortOrder}, #{record.delFlag}, #{record.createBy}, sysdate(), #{record.remark} )
